sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Procopius Gazaeus</hi> Rhetor [Procop.Gaz.] <date TEIform="date">v/vi A.D.</date> Ed. J. F. Boissonade, <title_ TEIform="title">Choricius,</title_> Paris 1846, pp. 129-78. <title_ TEIform="title">Ecphr.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔκφρασις ὡρολογίου,</foreign> ed. H. Diels, <title_ TEIform="title">Abh. Berl. Akad.</title_> 1917, No. 7 (cited by Boissonade's page, given in margin). <title_ TEIform="title">Ep. = Epistulae,</title_> ed. R. Hercher, <title_ TEIform="title">Epistolographi,</title_> p. 533. <title_ TEIform="title">Pan. = Panegyricus in Anastasium,</title_> ed. I. Bekker et B. G. Niebuhr, cum Dexippo et aliis, Bonn 1829 (cited by page); cf. C. Kemp, <title_ TEIform="title">Procopii Gazaei in Imp. Anastasium Panegyricus,</title_> Bonn 1918.</item>
